name: Vapi Assistant Quality Gate
purpose: Review exported call transcripts or test calls before a voice agent is considered production-ready.

required_behaviors: summarize appointment details before tool call
handoff cleanly when the user asks for unsupported advice
never claim a booking is complete before the booking tool succeeds
forbidden_behaviors: payment collection without explicit configured flow

quality_gate.sample_size: at least 20 synthetic calls before live use
